title: AD #10 · Attracting People to Rural Areas

rounds.name: Round 1 · 连接词
rounds.description: 转折 / 并列 / 因果 / 对比 / 让步 / 总结

tokens.v: Claire wants farm subsidies

Kelly wants to bring in shops and restaurants. Both ideas treat the surface of rural decline. The real fix is for the government to set up strong public services in rural areas first — good schools, clinics,
fast internet —

let private life grow on top of that.
The logic is about order. Subsidizing farmers only attracts people who already want to farm. Bringing in shops needs a customer base that the village does not yet have. Both run into the same trap: people will not move where services are weak,
services do not appear where people are few. Public services break this loop,
a government can build them without waiting for the market.
a village has a good school, a reliable clinic,
fast internet, a new kind of resident becomes possible — remote workers, retirees,

young families tired of city costs.
Build the base first. Shops, jobs, and even farms will follow
there is a reason to live there.

rounds.name: Round 4 · 句法骨架
rounds.description: 整块从句 / 介词短语 / 修饰结构

tokens.v: Claire wants farm subsidies and Kelly wants to bring in shops and restaurants. Both ideas treat the surface of rural decline. The real fix is

tokens.answer: for the government to set up strong public services in rural areas first —

tokens.v:
good schools, clinics, and fast internet — and let private life grow on top of that.
The logic is about order. Subsidizing farmers only attracts

tokens.answer: people who already want to farm.

tokens.v: Bringing in shops needs

tokens.answer: a customer base that the village does not yet have.

tokens.v: Both run into the same trap:

tokens.answer: people will not move where services are weak, and services do not appear where people are few.

tokens.v: Public services break this loop,

tokens.answer: because a government can build them without waiting for the market.

tokens.v: Once a village has a good school, a reliable clinic, and fast internet, a new kind of resident becomes possible —

tokens.answer: remote workers, retirees, and young families tired of city costs.

tokens.v:
Tulsa in the United States paired a $10,000 grant with better fiber optics and drew more than three thousand professionals in three years. Several empty Spanish towns came back to life the same way.
Build the base first. Shops, jobs, and even farms will follow

tokens.answer: once there is a reason to live there.
